recommended_value: Independent anti-TNF Crohn disease mucosal microarray family. GEO lists IDIBAPS/Barcelona submitter, CD-only colonic biopsy groups, and 39 arrays: 17 controls, 10 active CD without anti-TNF, 5 active CD anti-TNF non-responders, and 7 inactive CD anti-TNF responders. No public evidence of sample or subject overlap with the Leuven/ACT/GEMINI infliximab rows DS061-DS063/DS088.
